instruction: Fix completion_percent(completed, total) to return a float percentage from 0.0 through 100.0. Accept finite integer or float inputs but reject booleans and all other types. Raise ValueError when completed is negative, total is not positive, completed exceeds total, or either input is non-finite.
acceptance_criteria: completion_percent handles zero, full, and fractional boundaries
completion_percent raises ValueError for booleans, unsupported types, or non-finite values
completion_percent raises ValueError for invalid numeric ranges

verifiers.name: boundaries
verifiers.criterion: completion_percent handles zero, full, and fractional boundaries

verifiers.name: invalid-types
verifiers.criterion: completion_percent raises ValueError for booleans, unsupported types, or non-finite values

verifiers.name: invalid-ranges
verifiers.criterion: completion_percent raises ValueError for invalid numeric ranges
